title: Pest Control Services Page
content:
OUR SERVICES

Trusted pest control designed for homes and businesses. We combine expert strategies with proven techniques. Safe, eco-friendly solutions that deliver lasting protection.

Cockroach Control

Eliminate cockroaches from every corner with our advanced gel bait and spray treatments. We ensure long-lasting protection for a cleaner, healthier environment.

Bed bugs Control

Say goodbye to sleepless nights with our heat and chemical bed bug treatments. We target hidden eggs and adults for complete eradication and comfort.

Termite Control

Protect your home and furniture with our effective anti-termite solutions. We use safe and proven methods to prevent structural damage and costly repairs.

Mosquito Control

Keep your surroundings mosquito-free with our eco-friendly fogging and larvicidal treatments. We help reduce disease risk while maintaining environmental safety.

Flies Control

Eliminate houseflies and fruit flies with our hygienic fly management program. We focus on sanitation, breeding control, and quick removal techniques.

Rodent Control

Stop rodents from invading your space with our humane and effective solutions. We block entry points, remove infestations, and prevent future recurrence.

Bird Control

Prevent bird-related damage with our safe and ethical bird-proofing systems. We install nets and spikes to protect your property without harming wildlife.

Ant Control

Keep ants away from your kitchen and workspace with our targeted gel and spray treatments. We remove colonies from the root to stop them from coming back.

Residential Control

Ensure a pest-free home with our complete household pest management plan. We provide safe, family-friendly treatments tailored to your living space.

Commercial Control

Protect your business with our customized pest control programs for offices and industries. We maintain hygiene and compliance to safeguard your brand reputation.

Herbal Pest Control

Choose natural protection with our non-toxic herbal pest control solutions. Safe for children, pets, and the environment—yet tough on pests.

Fumigation Control

Our fumigation services ensure total disinfection for stored goods and large spaces. We provide certified, effective gas treatment for maximum pest elimination.

title: Cockroach Control Services
content:
Cockroach Control Services

Say Goodbye to Cockroach Infestations

Cockroaches are one of the most common and persistent household pests. Known for contaminating food, spreading harmful bacteria, and triggering allergies, they breed rapidly and are experts at hiding in cracks and crevices. A small problem can quickly escalate into a full-blown infestation without professional intervention. Our Cockroach Control Service provides a fast, safe, and effective solution for long-lasting relief.

Why Cockroach Control is Important

  • Spread of Diseases: Cockroaches are known carriers of harmful bacteria such as E. coli and Salmonella, which can cause food poisoning and other illnesses.
  • Allergen and Asthma Triggers: Their droppings and shed skin can trigger allergic reactions and asthma attacks, especially in children and individuals with respiratory issues.
  • Contamination: They contaminate food, utensils, and food preparation surfaces, posing a significant health risk.
  • Rapid Reproduction: Cockroaches reproduce at an alarming rate, turning a minor sighting into a severe infestation in a matter of weeks.

Our Approach

We follow a systematic and scientific approach to effectively eliminate cockroaches from your property:

  • Inspection: Our trained specialists conduct a thorough inspection to identify the species of cockroach, the extent of the infestation, and locate their primary hiding spots and breeding sources.
  • Targeted Treatment: We use a combination of advanced treatments, including eco-friendly gel baits placed in targeted, hard-to-reach areas and odorless sprays in hidden corners and crevices where cockroaches hide.
  • Crack & Crevice Treatment: We seal and treat all potential entry points and hiding spaces to prevent cockroaches from re-establishing themselves.
  • Monitoring & Prevention: We provide you with valuable advice on sanitation practices and other preventative measures. Follow-up visits are scheduled as needed to ensure complete eradication and long-term protection.

Pros

We follow a systematic and scientific approach to effectively eliminate cockroaches from your property:

  • Long-Lasting Protection: Our combination of gel and spray treatments provides a durable barrier against future infestations.
  • Safe for Your Family: We use professional-grade products that are safe for your family, pets, and the environment when applied correctly.
  • Clean and Hassle-Free: Our treatments are odorless, stain-free, and designed to cause minimal disruption to your daily routine.
  • Effective for All Properties:Our services are tailored to be effective for both residential and commercial spaces, from apartments to restaurants.

title: Bed Bug Control Services
content:
Bed Bug Control Services

Say Goodbye to Bed Bug Infestations

Bed bugs are a nightmare for homeowners and travelers alike, feeding on blood and leaving behind itchy, red welts. They are master hiders, often found in mattresses, furniture, and cracks in the walls, making them incredibly difficult to eradicate without professional intervention. Our Bed Bug Control Service offers a comprehensive and effective solution for quick, safe, and long-lasting relief.

Why Bed Bug Control is Important

  • Cause severe itching and discomfort:{' '} Bed bug bites can lead to incessant scratching, which may result in secondary skin infections.
  • Trigger allergic reactions:{' '} Some individuals may experience more severe allergic reactions to bed bug bites.
  • Spread rapidly: A single pregnant female can start a full-blown infestation in a short period, spreading from one room to another.
  • Affect mental health: The stress and anxiety associated with a bed bug infestation can significantly impact sleep and overall well-being.

Our Approach

We follow a thorough, multi-step process to eliminate bed bugs from your home:

  • Inspection: Our experts conduct a detailed inspection to locate all bed bug hiding spots, including mattresses, bed frames, furniture, and even electrical outlets.
  • Treatment: We use a combination of methods, such as heat treatment, which is highly effective in killing all life stages of bed bugs, and targeted application of insecticides to residual areas.
  • Crack & Crevice Treatment: We treat all potential harborage areas to ensure no bed bugs are left behind.
  • Monitoring & Prevention: We provide you with valuable tips on how to prevent future infestations and may schedule follow-up visits to ensure the problem is completely resolved.

Pros

  • Highly effective: Our treatments are designed to eliminate bed bugs at all life stages, including eggs.
  • Safe for your home: We use professional-grade products and techniques that are safe for your family and pets when applied correctly.
  • Minimal disruption: Our methods are designed to be as minimally disruptive to your daily life as possible.
  • Comprehensive solution: We don't just kill the bugs you see; we target the entire infestation to prevent a recurrence.

title: Termite Control Services
content:
Termite Control Services

Say Goodbye to Termite Infestations

Termites, often called /"silent destroyers/" can cause immense and costly damage to a home's structure. These wood-eating pests can go unnoticed for years, hollowing out wooden beams, flooring, and furniture from the inside out. A small problem can quickly become a severe and dangerous threat to your property's integrity. Our Termite Control Service provides a proactive, long-lasting solution to protect your most valuable asset.

Why Termite Control is Important?

  • Prevent Expensive Structural Damage: Termites can silently compromise the very foundation and framework of your home, leading to major repair costs.
  • Protect Your Property Value: A termite infestation can significantly devalue a property, making it difficult to sell or rent.
  • Avoid Health and Safety Risks: Termite damage can lead to compromised electrical wiring and weakened structures that may pose a risk to your family.
  • Stop Rapid Spread: Termite colonies can grow to millions of individuals, quickly spreading from a single entry point to other parts of your home and even to neighboring properties.

Our Approach

We follow a scientific and highly effective process to eliminate termites and protect your property:

  • Inspection: Our certified professionals conduct a thorough inspection to identify the type of termite, the extent of the infestation, and all entry points and active tunnels.
  • Customized Treatment: We use a combination of proven methods, including liquid termiticides to create a protective barrier around your property and baiting systems to eliminate the entire colony, including the queen.
  • Crack & Crevice Treatment: We treat and seal all cracks, voids, and crevices in your foundation and walls to prevent future entry.
  • Monitoring & Prevention: We provide post-treatment monitoring and guidance on how to prevent future infestations, such as controlling moisture and removing wood-to-soil contact.

Pros

  • Long-Term Protection: Our treatments provide a durable, long-lasting barrier to prevent future termite attacks.
  • Proven Effectiveness: We use industry-leading products and techniques that are scientifically proven to be effective against termites.
  • Minimally Invasive: Our methods are designed to be as non-disruptive as possible to your daily life.
  • Guaranteed Results: We stand behind our work with a service warranty, ensuring your home remains termite-free.

title: Mosquito Control Services
content:
Mosquito Control Services

Say Goodbye to Mosquito Infestations

Mosquitoes are more than just a nuisance; they are a significant health threat. These blood-sucking insects are notorious for carrying and transmitting serious diseases such as Dengue Fever, Malaria, Zika Virus, and West Nile Virus. They breed rapidly in stagnant water and can turn a pleasant outdoor space into a dangerous one. Our Mosquito Control Service offers a comprehensive and multi-faceted approach to reduce mosquito populations and protect your family.

Why Mosquito Control is Important?

  • Prevent Disease Transmission: Mosquitoes are vectors for some of the world's deadliest diseases, posing a direct threat to public health.
  • Enhance Quality of Life: By eliminating mosquitoes, we help you reclaim your outdoor spaces, allowing you to enjoy your yard, patio, and garden without constant irritation from bites.
  • Stop Rapid Breeding: A single container of stagnant water can breed hundreds of mosquitoes in just a few days. Professional control is essential to break their life cycle.
  • Protect Your Pets: Mosquitoes can also transmit heartworm to dogs and cats, a potentially fatal disease.

Our Approach

We follow a strategic and scientific process to manage mosquito populations effectively:

  • Inspection: Our experts will conduct a thorough inspection of your property to identify all potential mosquito breeding sites, such as standing water in flowerpots, gutters, ponds, and other containers.
  • Larval Control: We target mosquitoes at their source by applying eco-friendly larvicides to stagnant water sources, preventing mosquito larvae from developing into biting adults.
  • Adult Mosquito Treatment: We apply targeted treatments to areas where adult mosquitoes rest, such as shrubs, trees, tall grasses, and other vegetation. This includes misting and barrier spray applications.
  • Prevention & Education: We provide you with crucial information on how to eliminate breeding sites around your home and educate you on proactive steps to keep mosquitoes at bay.

Pros

  • Highly Effective: Our multi-pronged approach targets mosquitoes at every stage of their life cycle for maximum control.
  • Customized to Your Property: We tailor our treatment plans to your specific needs and the unique landscape of your property.
  • Safe for Your Environment: We use professional-grade products that are effective against mosquitoes but designed to be safe for your family, pets, and beneficial insects like bees.
  • Long-Lasting Results: Our barrier treatments provide continuous protection, allowing you to enjoy your outdoor spaces with peace of mind.

title: Fly Control Services
content:
Fly Control Services

Say Goodbye to Fly Infestations

Flies are not just a nuisance; they pose a serious health risk. Known for their ability to carry and spread a wide range of bacteria and pathogens, they can contaminate food and surfaces, leading to illnesses such as E. coli and Salmonella. Their rapid breeding cycle can turn a small problem into a severe infestation in a matter of days. Our Fly Control Service provides a comprehensive, sanitary, and effective solution to manage and eliminate fly populations.

Why Fly Control is Important?

  • Prevent Disease Transmission: Flies travel between unsanitary areas like garbage and animal waste and your food, transmitting over 100 different pathogens.
  • Protect Food and Health: A fly infestation can quickly contaminate food and food preparation areas, posing a direct threat to the health of your family or customers.
  • Maintain Hygiene and Reputation: In commercial settings, a fly problem can severely damage a business's reputation and lead to health code violations.
  • Stop Rapid Breeding: Flies can lay hundreds of eggs at a time, allowing their population to explode if not professionally managed.

Our Approach

We follow a strategic and multi-step process to eliminate flies and prevent their return:

  • Inspection: We conduct a thorough inspection to identify the species of fly, locate their breeding sites (such as garbage cans, drains, and compost piles), and determine their entry points.
  • Source Elimination: The most critical step is to identify and treat or remove the source of the infestation. We will advise on and implement solutions for sanitation and waste management.
  • Targeted Treatment: We use a combination of methods, including the strategic placement of fly baits, targeted residual sprays in problem areas, and the installation of professional-grade Insect Light Traps (ILTs).
  • Monitoring & Prevention: We provide you with a detailed plan for ongoing sanitation and exclusion to prevent future infestations. Regular monitoring ensures the problem is completely resolved.

Pros

  • Comprehensive Solution: Our approach targets flies at every stage of their life cycle, from eggs to adults.
  • Effective & Safe: We use professional-grade products and techniques that are highly effective against flies while being safe for your family, pets, and food environments.
  • Improved Hygiene: Our services not only eliminate flies but also help improve overall sanitation in your home or business.
  • Customized for Your Needs: We create a tailored plan for each unique situation, whether it's for a residential kitchen or a commercial restaurant.

title: Rodent Control Services
content:
Rodent Control Services

Say Goodbye to Rodent Infestations

Rodents, including mice and rats, are not just a nuisance; they are a significant threat to your property and health. These cunning pests can chew through electrical wires, wooden structures, and insulation, causing costly and dangerous damage. They also spread a variety of diseases through their droppings and urine, posing a serious risk to your family. Our Rodent Control Service provides a safe, effective, and comprehensive solution to eliminate rodents and protect your home.

Why Rodent Control is Important?

  • Prevent Property Damage: Rodents constantly gnaw on materials to wear down their teeth, leading to damage to walls, furniture, wiring, and plumbing.
  • Avoid Health Risks: Rodents carry and transmit numerous diseases, including Hantavirus, Salmonellosis, and Leptospirosis, through their waste and bites.
  • Contaminate Food and Surfaces: They contaminate food storage areas and kitchen surfaces with their droppings and urine, posing a direct threat to food safety.
  • Stop Rapid Breeding: Rodents reproduce incredibly fast, turning a single sighting into a severe infestation in a short period.

Our Approach

We follow a strategic and humane process to eliminate rodents and secure your property:

  • Inspection: Our certified professionals conduct a thorough inspection to identify the species of rodent, their entry points, nesting sites, and travel routes.
  • Exclusion: We focus on a long-term solution by sealing all entry points, such as cracks in the foundation, gaps around pipes, and vents, to prevent future access.
  • Trapping & Baiting: We use a combination of discreet, professional-grade traps and tamper-resistant bait stations placed in strategic, low-traffic areas to effectively eliminate the active rodent population.
  • Sanitation & Prevention: We provide expert advice on how to remove food sources and harborage areas. We will also clean and sanitize affected areas to remove odors and disease-causing pathogens.

Pros

  • Comprehensive Solution: Our approach targets the entire rodent problem, from eliminating the current population to preventing future infestations.
  • Safe for Your Home: We use professional methods that are effective against rodents but designed to be safe for your family and pets.
  • Humane & Effective: We prioritize humane methods, and our strategic placement ensures quick and effective results.
  • Guaranteed Peace of Mind: We stand behind our work with a service guarantee, ensuring your home remains rodent-free.

title: Bird Control Services
content:
Bird Control Services

Say Goodbye to Nuisance Bird Infestations

While beautiful in nature, birds can become a major nuisance when they roost on buildings, ledges, and other structures. Their droppings are not only unsightly but also highly corrosive, damaging paint, rooftops, and machinery. They can also carry diseases and parasites, posing a health risk to people. Our Bird Control Service offers a humane, effective, and lasting solution to deter birds and protect your property.

Why Bird Control is Important?

  • Prevent Property Damage: Bird droppings are highly acidic and can corrode building materials, vehicles, and air conditioning units, leading to costly repairs.
  • Avoid Health Risks: Bird nests and droppings can harbor and spread over 60 diseases, including Salmonella and E. coli, and attract other pests like mites, ticks, and fleas.
  • Maintain Aesthetic Appeal: Bird nests and droppings can make a property look dirty and poorly maintained, negatively impacting your business or home's image.
  • Reduce Noise and Mess: Roosting birds can create a significant amount of noise and a continuous mess from nesting materials and droppings.

Our Approach

We follow a safe, humane, and effective process to manage and deter birds:

  • Inspection: We perform a thorough inspection to identify the bird species, the extent of the infestation, and their entry, roosting, and nesting sites.
  • Customized Solutions: We use a combination of non-lethal, humane deterrents, such as bird spikes on ledges, netting to block off large areas, and electric shock tracks to create a harmless, uncomfortable landing spot.
  • Cleaning & Sanitation: We safely and professionally clean and sanitize the affected areas to remove all droppings, nesting materials, and associated pathogens.
  • Monitoring & Prevention: We advise on preventative measures, such as removing food sources and sealing potential entry points, and can schedule follow-up visits to ensure the solution remains effective.

Pros

  • Humane & Safe: All our methods are designed to deter birds without causing them harm.
  • Long-Lasting Protection: Our installations provide a durable, long-term solution to bird problems.
  • Aesthetically Pleasing: Our solutions, like transparent netting, are designed to be effective without detracting from your property's appearance.
  • Effective for Various Species: We have solutions for a wide range of common nuisance birds, including pigeons, sparrows, and starlings.

title: Ant Control Services
content:
Ant Control Services

Say Goodbye to Ant Infestations

Ants are one of the most persistent and widespread household pests. While some species are just a nuisance, others can cause significant damage or even pose health risks. They are masters at finding their way into homes in search of food and water, often forming long trails and building nests in hard-to-reach places. A small foraging trail can quickly become a large-scale infestation. Our Ant Control Service provides a comprehensive, targeted, and long-lasting solution to eliminate ants and protect your property.

Why Ant Control is Important?

  • Contaminate Food: Ants can travel through unsanitary areas and then crawl all over your food, utensils, and countertops, contaminating them with bacteria.
  • Property Damage: Certain species, such as carpenter ants, can cause structural damage by excavating wood to create nests.
  • Painful Bites and Stings: Some ants, like fire ants, can deliver painful and allergic reactions through their bites or stings.
  • Stop Rapid Colony Growth: Ants live in vast colonies, and a small trail of foragers is often just the tip of the iceberg, with the main colony hidden somewhere nearby.

Our Approach

We follow a systematic and effective process to eliminate ants at their source:

  • Inspection: Our experts conduct a detailed inspection to identify the ant species, locate the nest, and track their entry points and foraging trails.
  • Targeted Baiting: We use professional-grade ant baits that are irresistible to ants. The foragers carry the bait back to the colony, including the queen, ensuring the entire nest is eliminated from the inside out.
  • Barrier Treatment: We apply targeted, long-lasting liquid treatments to the exterior of your home, creating a protective barrier that prevents new ants from entering.
  • Exclusion & Prevention: We provide you with valuable advice on how to prevent future infestations, such as sealing cracks and crevices and maintaining proper sanitation to remove food sources.

Pros

  • Effective for the Entire Colony: Our baiting system ensures the elimination of the queen and the entire colony, not just the visible foragers.
  • Long-Lasting Protection: Our combination of baiting and barrier treatments provides a durable, long-term solution.
  • Minimal Disruption: Our methods are designed to be minimally invasive, with no strong odors or lingering residue.
  • Safe and Targeted: We use professional-grade products that are highly effective against ants while being safe for your family and pets when applied correctly.

title: Herbal Pest Control Services
content:
Herbal Pest Control Services

At Orion Pest Control, we believe in offering our customers innovative, environmentally-friendly, and sustainable pest management solutions. Our Herbal Pest Control services are designed to protect your home and business while promoting a healthier, greener environment. Say goodbye to harmful chemicals and embrace nature's power with our safe and effective herbal treatments.

Why Choose Herbal Pest Control?

Eco-Friendly and Non-Toxic

Unlike traditional chemical pest control methods, herbal pest control uses natural plant-based solutions. These non-toxic ingredients effectively eliminate pests while being safe for your family, pets, and the environment. By choosing herbal pest control, you help reduce the use of harmful chemicals that can pollute water, soil, and air.

Targeted Pest Control Solutions

Herbal pest control targets a wide range of common pests, including ants, mosquitoes, spiders, cockroaches, and rodents, without harming beneficial insects or wildlife. Our herbal formulations act as repellents or disrupt the pests' natural behavior, leading to long-term pest control results.

Safe for Children and Pets

One of the primary advantages of herbal pest control is that it is safe for everyone in your household, including children and pets. You no longer have to worry about the risks associated with toxic pesticides that can harm your loved ones.

Sustainable and Natural

Our herbal pest control services are in line with our commitment to sustainability. By using natural remedies such as essential oils, plant extracts, and herbal powders, we provide an eco-conscious solution that doesn't contribute to the growing problem of pesticide resistance.

How Does Herbal Pest Control Work?

Herbal pest control uses plant-based substances that are known to repel or eliminate pests. Some of the key ingredients in our treatments include

  • Peppermint Oil: A natural repellent for ants, spiders, and rodents.
  • Cedarwood: Effective for repelling moths, termites, and other insects.
  • Neem Oil: A powerful pest deterrent for a wide range of insects, including mosquitoes, beetles, and aphids.
  • Eucalyptus: Helps repel mosquitoes and other flying insects.
  • Lemongrass: Known for repelling pests like ticks, fleas, and flies.

When these herbal solutions are applied strategically around your home or business, they create an environment that pests find uncomfortable, leading them to move elsewhere without causing harm to your property or the ecosystem.

Our Herbal Pest Control Process

At Orion Pest Control, we take a personalized approach to every pest issue. Our process is simple, efficient, and environmentally friendly:

  1. Inspection: We conduct a thorough inspection of your property to identify the types of pests and any potential entry points.
  2. Tailored Treatment Plan: Based on the inspection, we craft a customized herbal pest control plan that is designed to address the specific needs of your space.
  3. Herbal Treatment Application: We apply our eco-friendly, herbal pest control solutions to both the interior and exterior of your property.
  4. Follow-Up: Our team will monitor the effectiveness of the treatment and offer ongoing support as needed to ensure long-term pest control.

Benefits of Choosing Orion Pest Control's Herbal Solutions

  • No Harsh Chemicals: Our treatments are made from natural ingredients that are safe for people, pets, and plants.
  • Long-Term Protection: Our herbal remedies work to keep pests at bay for the long term, minimizing the need for frequent reapplications.
  • Affordable and Effective: Our herbal pest control services offer a cost-effective alternative to traditional pest control methods, with sustainable results.
  • Preventative Care: We don't just eliminate pests—we help prevent future infestations by identifying and addressing the root cause.

Pests We Treat with Herbal Solutions

  • Ants: Herbal oils such as peppermint and cinnamon are highly effective in driving ants away.
  • Mosquitoes: Eucalyptus and citronella oils act as natural mosquito repellents.
  • Rodents: Strong-smelling herbs like peppermint and bay leaves can deter rodents from entering your space.
  • Spiders: Essential oils like tea tree and lavender discourage spiders from nesting in your home.

Get Started with Herbal Pest Control Today

At Orion Pest Control, we are committed to providing safe, natural, and effective pest control solutions that align with your eco-friendly values. Our herbal pest control services are the perfect choice for anyone looking to protect their home or business from pests without compromising on safety or environmental responsibility.

Contact us today to schedule a consultation and learn more about how our herbal pest control solutions can give you peace of mind, knowing your property is safe and pest-free!

title: Fumigation Pest Control Services
content:
Fumigation Pest Control Services

Orion Pest Solutions is a duly approved and accredited ISO certified company, committed to provide quality and efficient services in fumigation procedures with the `use of METHYL BROMIDE and ALUMINIUM PHOSPHIDE to control pests in India. We work 24/7 to help our clients protect their surroundings from infectious pesticides through our fumigation pest control solutions.

Fumigation pest control services

Orion Pest Solutions offers a wide range of fumigation services to safeguard your residential and commercial space from pests and protect your health from infections and diseases caused by damaging insects like termites, cockroaches, mice, bedbugs and flies. We provide the most effective fumigation services to eradicate the entire range of pests which are detrimental to the health of you and your family as well as the image of your business. Our experienced team of specialists are dedicated and committed to offer the best fumigation pest control services to control pest infestations and eliminate them to the core.

Fumigation procedure

Fumigation is a process of eliminating harmful pests and insects through the use of gaseous pesticides or fumigants at a certain temperature and pressure to suffocate or poison the pests within. The infected area is completely sealed off for a certain period of time during this process in order to ensure that the fumigants are spread inside completely to destroy the existing pest infestations.

Methods of fumigation

Fumigation is used to prevent pests in any structural space, food, soil or grain. We, at Orion, employ highly experienced pest control specialists who are well-versed with the latest technology and equipment for pest control and eradication, thereby reducing the risk of damage to your home, office or warehouse. We drive successful pest control solutions for the human health and property which includes the usage of fumigants, safety equipment, insecticides, sprayers, and chemicals.

At Orion, we offer a wide array of fumigation services, tailored to your pest control needs and requirements

Wooden pallets fumigation

We carry out fumigation of wooden pallets with methyl bromide at the dosage of 48 gms per mtr cube. The wooden pallets are placed in fumigation covers which are sealed and then grounded under the floor. Gas monitoring is performed during the exposure period and thereafter, the fumigation covers are removed.

Empty container fumigation

To minimize the risk of damage to your empty holds, we perform fumigation services with gaseous pesticides complying with high safety standards and practices. We fill the empty containers with Methyl Bromide to suffocate the existing pests within and exterminate them.

Cargo fumigation

Cargo is used to store goods like animal feed, grains and non-food agricultural products and transport them from one place to another on the port. Cargoes are highly exposed to the threat of pests and insects. Hence, it is mandatory to perform cargo fumigation before shipping. We perform cargo fumigation in either solid, liquid or gaseous form to protect the goods from pest infestation.

Tobacco fumigation

We provide effective tobacco fumigation solutions at warehouses or containers with the use of phosphine to prevent moth or beetle infestation. We incorporate advanced technology for the fumigation of tobacco to control pests, adhering to health and safety standards on the whole.

Seeds fumigation

Seeds or grains are prone to getting infected by pests and insects. Hence, sanitization of seeds is very essential to prevent deterioration or losses by employing necessary pest control. Our unique seeds fumigation is highly reliable and beneficial to eradicate these dangerous pests and insects.

Warehouse fumigation

We offer efficient warehouse fumigation solutions to your business to avoid deterioration or damage of stored goods or products. Warehouses are a much sought after place for rodents, pests and insects. They are likely to cause damage to your stored goods in the warehouse, affecting your brand reputation. Our warehouse fumigation is carried out with the application of phosphine which can penetrate beneath the kernels and loosely stored goods and kill the habitats instantly.

Agriculture products fumigation

Our agricultural products fumigation is quite helpful in preventing major deterioration caused by pests and insects. We employ our best technicians to carry out the fumigation to get rid of pest infestation. They perform the operation with due diligence and care with proper calculation of the amount of fumigants to be used.

Flour Mills fumigation

Flour mills are equipped with machinery for grinding, crushing and cutting of grains and cereals into flour. In such places, the pest-rate generally tends to be on a higher side. Therefore, pest control is a mandate to eradicate pest threat and the damage of the raw materials. Rest assured, our flour mills fumigation are much effective and are implemented with high protection of the raw materials from any sort of damage.

Timber fumigation

Our pest control services also include timber fumigation with Methyl Bromide. Timber is used to build our houses, furniture or flooring. We apply liquid or gaseous fumigants to deal with beetle and woodworms in timber. The fumigants are deeply penetrated onto all of the timbers to offer a substantial pest treatment.

Ship and Aircraft fumigation

For transportation of goods in ships and aircrafts using containers, fumigation plays a vital role as it is essential to keep away pests and insects before entering into a foreign land. We perform the fumigation at the loading port as well as at the port of discharge to ensure double protection with the highest standards.
